title: Canonical platform and tenant role model repair
objective: Replace the legacy membership-based SUPER_ADMIN/OWNER/ADMIN role model with the canonical split between User.platformRole=SUPER_ADMIN and Membership.role in {TENANT_ADMIN,PUBLISHER}, while hardening first-password and password recovery flows.
migrationContract: Add User.platformRole as the only global SUPER_ADMIN storage
Keep Membership.role only for TENANT_ADMIN and PUBLISHER after repair
Convert Membership.SUPER_ADMIN into User.platformRole and remove obsolete SUPER_ADMIN memberships
Convert OWNER and ADMIN memberships to TENANT_ADMIN
Abort with safe report if STRATEGIST, EDITOR, ANALYST, APPROVER, or VIEWER are present in target data
Do not mutate production without explicit human approval
acceptance: SUPER_ADMIN is stored only on User.platformRole
Membership.role only allows TENANT_ADMIN and PUBLISHER as functional roles
activeTenantId selects context only and never grants authorization
mvera and jean bootstrap paths resolve as platform admins without tenant membership
First-password setup requires password confirmation and minimum length
Password reset tokens are one-time use, expiring, and do not reveal account existence
Legacy role repair is idempotent and aborts on ambiguous roles with a safe report
rollbackNotes: Do not apply the repair script to production without prior backup and human approval
If ambiguous roles are detected, stop before enum finalization and keep legacy data untouched
Schema finalization must happen only after the repair report is clean

history.description: Repair task created because TEN-01 closed with the obsolete OWNER/ADMIN/VIEWER model and SUPER_ADMIN inside Membership.role.
